kalkutta.note: Calcutta → Kolkata; Open-Meteo returns a Kerala village otherwise

seliger.note: Lake Seliger, Tverskaya oblast; geocoder returned a Svalbard point

ples.note: Плёс on the Volga, Ivanovo oblast; geocoder picked Plesetsk by population

rostov.note: Ростов Великий, Yaroslavl oblast — Ростов-на-Дону is the separate rostov-na-donu entry

echmiadzin.note: Echmiadzin (Vagharshapat); Soviet-era name still in common use

amalfi.note: Amalfi, Italy; geocoder returned a Colombian village

alaniya.note: Alanya, Turkey; alt spelling of Аланья

kemer.note: Kemer, Turkey; geocoder picked Kemerovo by population

datcha.note: Datça, Turkey; alt Cyrillic spelling of Дача
